statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // .model.name // "unknown-model"'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); transcript=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty'); workdir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // "."'); rate_file=''; search_dir="$workdir"; while [ "$search_dir" != "/" ]; do candidate="$search_dir/.claude/bedrock-pricing.env"; [ -f "$candidate" ] && { rate_file="$candidate"; break; }; search_dir=$(dirname "$search_dir"); done; [ -n "$rate_file" ] && . "$rate_file"; in_tokens=0; out_tokens=0; if [ -n "$transcript" ] && [ -f "$transcript" ]; then stats=$(jq -s '{in:(map(.message.usage.input_tokens // .usage.input_tokens // .input_tokens // .request.usage.input_tokens // .metrics.input_tokens // 0) | add // 0), out:(map(.message.usage.output_tokens // .usage.output_tokens // .output_tokens // .response.usage.output_tokens // .metrics.output_tokens // 0) | add // 0)}' "$transcript" 2>/dev/null); in_tokens=$(echo "$stats" | jq -r '.in // 0'); out_tokens=$(echo "$stats" | jq -r '.out // 0'); fi; total_tokens=$((in_tokens + out_tokens)); fmt_tokens=$(awk -v n="$total_tokens" 'BEGIN{if(n>=1000000){printf "%.1fM", n/1000000}else if(n>=1000){printf "%.1fk", n/1000}else{printf "%d", n}}'); model_lc=$(printf '%s' "$model" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'); input_rate="${BEDROCK_DEFAULT_INPUT_PER_MTOK:-$BEDROCK_INPUT_PER_MTOK}"; output_rate="${BEDROCK_DEFAULT_OUTPUT_PER_MTOK:-$BEDROCK_OUTPUT_PER_MTOK}"; case "$model_lc" in *haiku*) input_rate="${BEDROCK_HAIKU_INPUT_PER_MTOK:-$input_rate}"; output_rate="${BEDROCK_HAIKU_OUTPUT_PER_MTOK:-$output_rate}" ;; *sonnet*) input_rate="${BEDROCK_SONNET_INPUT_PER_MTOK:-$input_rate}"; output_rate="${BEDROCK_SONNET_OUTPUT_PER_MTOK:-$output_rate}" ;; *opus*) input_rate="${BEDROCK_OPUS_INPUT_PER_MTOK:-$input_rate}"; output_rate="${BEDROCK_OPUS_OUTPUT_PER_MTOK:-$output_rate}" ;; esac; cost=''; if [ -n "$input_rate" ] && [ -n "$output_rate" ]; then cost=$(awk -v i="$in_tokens" -v o="$out_tokens" -v ir="$input_rate" -v or="$output_rate" 'BEGIN{printf "$%.4f", (i/1000000)*ir + (o/1000000)*or}'); fi; T='\033[38;2;76;79;105m'; M='\033[38;2;217;119;87m'; Y='\033[38;2;223;142;29m'; R='\033[0m'; printf "${T}${model}${R}"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && printf " ${M}ctx:${remaining}%%${R}"; printf " ${Y}usage:${fmt_tokens}t${R}"; [ -n "$cost" ] && printf " ${Y}${cost}${R}"; echo
statusLine.description: Status line showing model, available context, and per-session usage (plus optional Bedrock cost estimate)
